description.value: The pact has grown. What once was a desperate one-sided bargain has become a genuine channel of power in both directions. You are no longer just drawing from the connection. The connection is drawing from you.

system.benefits: Once per long rest, you may declare an Instant Recovery as a [Free] action, immediately recovering your full Energy pool as though you had taken a short rest. Reduce your max Energy by your Charisma score until long rest.

usage.text: Instant Recovery once per long rest as [Free] action; max Energy reduced until long rest
